id.description: Stable event id from the sender. Used for dedupe/upsert.

time_ms.description: Meeting-relative timestamp in milliseconds. Use only when the sender already knows the meeting offset.

captured_at_ms.description: Absolute epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the annotation/stroke was captured. Required for production device events that may be uploaded late or in batches.

captured_at.description: Absolute ISO timestamp when the annotation/stroke was captured. Use captured_at_ms when possible.

ink_end_at_ms.description: Absolute epoch timestamp in milliseconds when the ink stroke group ended.

timestamp.description: Absolute ISO timestamp. The server converts it to meeting-relative time.

timestamp_ms.description: Absolute sender epoch timestamp in milliseconds. Kept for compatibility; captured_at_ms is preferred.

device_time_ms.description: Absolute device epoch timestamp in milliseconds.

label.description: Human-readable label shown on the timeline.

text.description: Best current text reading, if any.

target.description: Optional target region or resolved document/UI object.

strokes.description: Raw stroke points or stroke groups from the input device. If points contain absolute t/ts/timestamp_ms values, the server can infer captured_at_ms from the latest point.

timing.description: Optional timing wrapper. Supports captured_at_ms, captured_at, time_ms, offset_ms, relative_ms, and meeting_time_ms.

meeting_session.description: Optional inline open meeting session context. When present, the server starts or reuses a meeting axis before normalizing this annotation.

meeting_id.description: Stable meeting/session id if the detector has one.

start_time_ms.description: Absolute epoch timestamp in milliseconds for the meeting/session start.

start_time.description: ISO timestamp for the meeting/session start.

start_meeting_session.description: Alternative inline session start flag. When true, top-level meeting_* fields are used to create an open meeting session.

force_meeting_session.description: Allow inline meeting_session to replace a different active real meeting axis.

force_new_session.description: Explicitly start a new pending annotation session instead of attaching to the current concrete meeting axis.
